productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Nike Checks Black Duffle Bags
description: The perfect overnight bag has arrived! nike gives you a bag you can use for your weekend trips. It has tons of space in an eye-catching plaid pattern, with an international silhoutte. Arrive in style! Measurement Height: 31 cm Width: 56 cm Depth: 22 cm Capacity: 36 litres Made of 35% polyurethane and 65% polyester for enhanced durability and style 95% cotton and 5% polyester lining for increased durability and breathability One main roomy zippered compartment Two small zippered pockets, and two mesh pouches inside to stow essentials short handles for carrying ease Snap buttons to clip the handles together for added convenience Detachable sling for carrying bag on shoulder Plaid checks all over in black and grey with white and neon green accents Synthetic leather overlays on the sides with brand name and logo Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Brand name and logo embroidered on the front for branding and added attraction Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
